## 🐛 Bug Report

**Bug Type:**
- [ ] API Issue
- [ ] Database Issue
- [ ] UI/UX Issue
- [ ] Performance Issue
- [ ] Security Issue
- [ ] Documentation Issue
- [ ] Build/CI Issue
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Severity:**
- [ ] Critical (blocks development/usage)
- [ ] High (major functionality broken)
- [ ] Medium (partial functionality affected)
- [ ] Low (minor issue or cosmetic)

## 📝 Submission Guidelines

Please ensure:
- [ ] Bug description is clear and concise
- [ ] Steps to reproduce are complete
- [ ] Environment information is provided
- [ ] Error messages/logs are included
- [ ] Severity assessment is accurate

**Security Note:** For security-related bugs, please consider reporting them privately first if they could be exploited.
